Description: Raw building permit applications submitted by developers and contractors to municipal governments across Canada.
Notes: Primary origination point. Permit issuance triggers a 'housing start' classification when construction commences.

Description: CMHC field agents conduct monthly direct surveys of builders and developers to supplement permit data and capture starts not yet reflected in municipal records.
Notes: Accounts for ~15% of records. Flagged with SURVEY_METHOD = 'Direct Survey'.

Description: Central ingestion layer that consolidates permit data from municipalities, survey responses from field agents, and administrative data from provincial registries. Applies initial validation and deduplication.
Notes: Deduplication key: GEO_CODE + REF_DATE + DWELLING_TYPE + INTENDED_MARKET. Records with STATUS='F' suppressed at this layer.

Description: Applies enterprise data quality rules across completeness, validity, accuracy, and uniqueness dimensions. Flags records with DQ issues for steward review. Generates DQ scorecard metrics.
Notes: 50+ business rules applied. Failed records written to DQ Exception Table. Rule results populate DQ scorecard dashboard.

Description: All data assets, CDEs, data lineage, stewardship assignments, and governance policies are documented and managed in Collibra. Business glossary terms linked to physical columns.
Notes: 100+ critical data assets documented. Lineage maps maintained for all CDEs. Stewardship workflows triggered for DQ issues.

System_Name: Statistics Canada CODR (Common Output Data Repository)
Description: Approved, quality-validated data published to Statistics Canada's public open data platform. Data undergoes final suppression review before release.
Notes: Final published asset. Accessible via open.canada.ca. STATUS field reflects suppression flags.

Description: Internal executive dashboards tracking housing supply KPIs, provincial trends, and affordability indicators. Refreshed monthly from published dataset.
Notes: Primary consumer for policy reporting. Filters on STATUS != 'F' by default.

Description: Feeds housing supply data into federal housing affordability reports submitted to Treasury Board and the Minister of Housing.
Notes: CDE-level lineage required for audit trail. Any corrections to source data must be traced to this report.
